title: Create: Automation Expansion
description: A create mod addon which allows the automation of most useful items in minecraft
body: Create: Automation Expansion is a small project I am developing as my first minecraft mod, it will allow you to automate almost every single useful minecraft item such as diamonds, netherite, netherrack, and more! Of course, the more rarer items like netherite have incredibly difficult recipes which encourages you to work hard and spend time to build a factory worthy of automating these items. This mod will allow the full and efficient automation of these items. It is currently a work in progress project.
